scope: All documented REST paths from the BambooHR ReadMe OpenAPI registries are represented. Basic-auth JSON GET endpoints are streams, Basic-auth JSON/path mutations are write actions, OAuth-only endpoints preserve the legacy API-key credential model as scoped exclusions, and binary/multipart/deprecated/read-like POST endpoints are explicitly excluded.
